summary: Frontend mobile responsiveness testing completed for CRM app on 375x800 viewport. All requested pages (Budget, Facturation, Tâches, Assistant IA, Contacts) tested for mobile responsiveness. Floating buttons verified to not overlap.
critical_code_review_comments: Budget page uses grid-cols-2 for mobile cards (2x2 layout) - correctly implemented
Tabs container has overflow-x-auto with min-w-max for horizontal scroll - working
Kanban columns are 260px on mobile with horizontal scroll container - working
AI Assistant page has Perplexity-style centered design with input at bottom - correctly implemented
Floating buttons positioned at bottom-24 (AI) and bottom-6 (Quick Actions) with 16px gap - no overlap
context_for_next_testing_agent: All mobile responsiveness features verified working on 375x800 viewport. Budget page has 2x2 cards and scrollable tabs. Invoices page has responsive stats cards. Tasks Kanban has 260px columns with horizontal scroll. AI Assistant has Perplexity-style centered design. Contacts page has overflow-x-hidden. Floating buttons don't overlap (16px vertical gap).

budget_page_responsive.details: Cards in 2x2 grid (grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4). Tabs have overflow-x-auto container with min-w-max. 7 tabs available. Charts responsive. No horizontal overflow.

invoices_page_responsive.details: Stats cards in 2x2 grid (grid-cols-2 gap-2 sm:gap-4). Tabs with horizontal scroll. Table displays properly on mobile. No horizontal overflow.

tasks_kanban_responsive.details: Kanban container has overflow-x-auto. Columns are 260px wide on mobile. Multiple columns with horizontal scroll. No body horizontal overflow.

ai_assistant_perplexity_style.details: Centered layout with minimalist design. Input field at bottom ('Posez une question...'). Suggestion buttons centered. Floating AI chat button hidden on this page. Clean dark background.

contacts_page_responsive.details: Has overflow-x-hidden container. 108 contacts displayed with mobile-specific layout. Search and filter controls accessible. No horizontal overflow.

floating_buttons_no_overlap.details: AI Chat button at bottom-24 (y: 648-704). Quick Actions at bottom-6 (y: 720-776). Vertical gap of 16px - no overlap. Both positioned at right-6.
